
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for H2O w. bond length 1.85 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...

Number of electrons: 10, Number of orbitals: 13
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 6 active virtual orbitals (out of 8 total virtual orbitals).

Optimization finished. Final MP2 energy = -75.84611578585728 Hartree. (ΔE_corr = -0.2326896084667619 Hartree)
OVOS optimized orbitals are restricted (RHF-like).


Running VQE optimization with SlowQuant using OVOS-optimized orbitals as reference...
OVOS optimized energy = -80.460279 Hartree @ iterations 221.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...
UHF energy = -80.453801 Hartree @ iterations 165.

Calculating UMP2 natural orbitals for comparison...

UMP2 natural orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).
